name: gitnexus
description: Code intelligence powered by a knowledge graph. Provides execution flow tracing, blast radius analysis, and augmented search across your codebase.

interface.shortDescription: Code intelligence from a local knowledge graph
interface.longDescription: GitNexus indexes repositories into a local knowledge graph for code exploration, debugging, impact analysis, and safer refactoring. This plugin expects the GitNexus CLI to be installed globally so Codex can start the MCP server with `gitnexus mcp`.
defaultPrompt: Use GitNexus to explain this codebase
Analyze the impact of my current changes
Trace this bug through the knowledge graph
